name: Ocal Browser v3.2.238-beta: Pro Purple-Glow Edition
body:
### 🌌 The Next Frontier of Agentic Browsing

This major release introduces the **v3.2.238-beta** update, focusing on critical fixes for the PDF engine and core browser stabilization.

#### 📄 Integrated PDF & Document Engine (FIXED)
- **CSP Worker Access**: Resolved critical Content Security Policy (CSP) violations that prevented worker threads from initializing.
- **Local Resource Loading**: Fixed 'Not allowed to load local resource' errors when opening PDF files from the OS.
- **Native Hub**: PDFs now open reliably within Ocal's premium reading environment with high-speed rendering.

#### ⚙️ System Level & Core Stabilization
- **Protocol Resolution**: Fixed a loop in recursive `ocal://` protocol resolution for new tabs.
- **Version Alignment**: Full synchronization of versioning across the build pipeline and application metadata.
- **Persistent Context**: Improved handling of file paths passed via command line arguments.

#### 🛡️ Shield Hub v2.0 (Elite Modernization)
- **Bento-Grid Analytics**: Completely redesigned privacy center with glassmorphic cards and real-time interactive statistics (`blur(44px)` saturation).
- **High-Fidelity UI**: Implemented the 'Pro' design language across all security popups with dynamic SVG iconography.
